acceptance.assertion: Evidence can record per-axis notes for correctness, regression_risk, tests, security and integration without turning them into fake quantitative scores.
Gate behavior distinguishes missing axis consideration from a legitimate not-applicable conclusion.
The documentation states that notes improve accountability but do not prove review quality.
Tests cover missing axis notes, not-applicable rationale and ordinary clean-pass evidence.

goal: Add a lightweight evidence contract requiring short notes or explicit not-applicable rationale for each required self-review focus axis.

metadata.reason: Per-axis notes may improve review quality, but PR #111 limited itself to structural focus-axis presence.

title: Add review-focus notes contract
